name: easy-loop
description: A Stop-hook powered Easy Loop for Codex CLI that keeps retrying the same task until a promise or iteration limit is reached.

interface.longDescription: Runs an Easy Loop inside Codex using a Stop hook, persistent task state, and repeatable completion conditions.
defaultPrompt: Use Easy Loop to start or inspect the loop for this Codex session, asking for only the missing setup details.
Start an Easy Loop for this repo with safe defaults, a unique completion promise, and a truthful finish condition.
Explain whether this task is a good fit for Easy Loop before starting one, and show the current session status if a loop already exists.
